headline: Oil Rises as Trump Renews Threats Against Iran With Hormuz Shut
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Oil rose for a third day as President Donald Trump again pressured Iran to come to a deal to end weeks of war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz.
